docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S COMPANY, INC.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR CONTINUED TRIAL DATE HEARING SET FOR JUL-28-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSANG, JACQUELINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOWE'S COMPANY, INC. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE DAMAGE OCCURRED DURING WARRANTY PERIOD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LOWE'S COMPANY, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S COMPANY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR, CONTINUED IN THE CLERK'S OFFICE TO 7/28/17 @ 1:30 PM. FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,257.17 FILED BY TSANG, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK MURRAY. PLAINTIFF JAQUELINE TSANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOWE'S INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINE ALEGADO, ASSISTANT STORE MANAGER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION TO HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY TSANG, JACQUELINE LOWE'S COMPANY, INC.
